parameters.content:
## Review notification → email (F73.1 kb:n8n-review-notifications)

Reckons.AI POSTs here whenever new facts land for review — a grant scrape, a subscribed publisher's pod, or any ingest — so you get an email instead of having to open the graph.

**Setup:**
1. Import this workflow, open the Webhook node, copy the **production** URL. Its path must be `reckons-review` so it matches `POST {n8nBaseUrl}/webhook/reckons-review`.
2. In Reckons.AI → Settings → Integrations: set the n8n base URL and enable **Notify on review** (`n8nNotifyOnReview`).
3. On the Send node, attach a **Microsoft Outlook OAuth2** credential (Graph API, NOT SMTP — SMTP is blocked on a modern M365 tenant by Security Defaults) and set your recipient. Same Entra app-registration setup as the contact-feedback workflow.

Payload: `{ count, kind, source?, samples?[], at }`.

nodes.name: Send email
nodes.notes: Microsoft Graph API (OAuth2), NOT SMTP — SMTP is blocked on a modern M365 tenant by Security Defaults (535 5.7.139). Attach a Microsoft Outlook OAuth2 credential and set the recipient (toRecipients). Swap for the Gmail / Slack node to change channel — the app does not care how you are notified.
